cases.description: Charge Pump PFD State Machine: holds vctrl at the initial mid value so it never ramps toward the lead polarity and the late-window rail check fails.
Charge Pump PFD State Machine: keeps the vctrl ramp but reports the detector-state metric stuck at mid so the polarity check fails.
Charge Pump PFD State Machine: clamps the detector state to zero so edge crossings never move the control voltage and vctrl never reaches the rail.
Charge Pump PFD State Machine: integrates the control voltage with the wrong sign so it ramps opposite to the lead/lag relation.
Charge Pump PFD State Machine: drops the control-voltage clamps so vctrl rails past the supply bounds under a consistent lead.
